text:
Welcome to the Circuito de Jerez - Ángel Nieto where a thrilling race is underway! The pole position was secured by Samuel Hermer, and he takes the lead at the beginning of the race. Jakub Olszewski comes in at third, Conor D Gibb fourth, and Kenzy Nieuwhof in seventh.  Unfortunately, Andy Flint gets into a car contact on Lap 1 and falls to eighth, followed by Evan M Way who also suffers from a similar incident to land in ninth place. Antonio A Jimenez Tellez also experiences a car contact, falling to tenth place. Christian Glåmseter is eleventh, while Yuanxi Lin brings up the rear in twelfth.     
    At the start of Lap 2, Andy Flint moves up to seventh while Kenzy Nieuwhof falls to eighth. Robert Ridgway starts fourteenth and manages to take thirteenth at the end of the lap. Yuanxi Lin falls to fourteenth. Both Ridgway and Lin switch places again on Lap 3, with Ridgway climbing to twelfth.     
    On Lap 5, Kenzy Nieuwof regains his lost position, climbing back to seventh. Evan M Way follows him, taking eighth. Antonio A Jimenez Tellez manages ninth, while Christian Glåmseter and Andy Flint come in at tenth and eleventh, respectively. Robert Ridgway finds himself with the same position as before, twelfth. Yuanxi Lin now takes thirteenth.     
    As Lap 9 passes, Yuanxi Lin manages to take thirteenth place back. On Lap 12, Andy Flint moves up to tenth, while Christian Glåmseter drops to eleventh. At the start of Lap 17, Kenzy Neuwhof makes an impressive move, pushing forward to sixth position. Evan M Way and Antonio A Jimenez Tellez both move up to seventh and eighth, respectively, while Andy Flint takes ninth and Christian Glåmseter tenth. Robert Ridgway falls to eleventh, and Yuanxi Lin to twelfth.     
    Just past the halfway mark, incredible drama unfolds! Samuel Hermer loses control and Jakub Olszewski takes the lead, claiming first place. Samuel Hermer manages to hold on to second, while Conor D Gibb gets third. Kenzy Nieuwof rises to fourth and Evan M Way to fifth. Jakub Olszewski's reign is short-lived, however, as Samuel Hermer reclaims first place on Lap 28. Conor D Gibb takes second, followed by Kenzy Nieuwof in third, Evan M Way in fourth, and Jakub Olszewski in fifth. Andy Flint moves up to sixth, Robert Ridgway to seventh, Antonio A Jimenez Tellez to eighth, Christian Glåmseter to ninth, and Yuanxi Lin to tenth.     
    At the checkered flag, Samuel Hermer triumphs with an impressive victory, followed by Conor D Gibb in second place, Kenzy Nueuwhof third, Evan M Way fourth, and Jakub Olszewski fifth. Andy Flint takes sixth, Robert Ridgway seventh, Antonio A Jimenez Tellez eighth, Christian Glåmseter ninth, and Yuanxi Lin finishes in tenth place. It was an exciting race to the finish line with countless thrilling changes in the positions!
